assertions.text: [rubric-1] Discovers the existing derivePriority function in src/utils/format-task.ts

assertions.text: [rubric-2] Notes that a partial implementation already exists
assertions.evidence: The candidate notes that the function currently returns specific values ('high' for 'in_progress', otherwise 'medium') and mentions that comments in the code indicate it is partial.

assertions.text: [rubric-3] Identifies that derivePriority only handles basic cases and needs extension
assertions.evidence: The candidate states that the current implementation 'lacks custom rules support' and notes that 'derivePriority' needs full implementation with custom rules.
